prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023–2025年理科最低位次约104→466→337，2023年位次极高（104名），2024年大幅后移至466名，2025年回升至337名，近两年波动较大；2025年基准约337名。\ n本省理科计划2023年20人、2024年22人、2025年23人，逐年小幅扩招；2026年计划24人，较2025年增加1人，扩招幅度约4.3%，对竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉:
985、211、双一流；软科主榜连续多年稳居第3名（2021–2026均为第3），全国顶尖高校，对考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，涉及 学术不端、师德师风及校园安全事件，可能轻微影响部分考生报考意愿；抖音热度排名第14（高热），短视频曝光量大，关注度仍高；历史投档异常记录较少；拥有39个A-及以上学科，其中计算机科学与技术A+、软件工程A+、控制科学与工程A+、光学工程A+、动力工程及工程热物理A+等，学科实力极强，与理科招生专业高度匹配。
6. 【专业热度与环境】计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，与浙大工科试验班（信息）、计算机等王牌专业方向一致，推高竞争热度；本省2026年考生总数 约238000人（不确定标记），较2025年（理科52538人+文科24010人=76548人）大幅增长，按历史比例估算理科约16.3万人，竞争显著加剧。
7. 【地域因素】浙江大学位于浙江杭州，属东部沿海发达地区，对新疆考生有较强跨省吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次 337名、2026年计划小幅扩招（4.3%）、本省考生大幅增加及声誉偏负面等因素，扩招缓解效应被考生激增所抵消，竞争总体略加剧；预测最低位次约361名，区间311–411名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（竺可桢学院图灵班）（计算机科学与技术）
- 人工智能
- 工科试验班（信息）（计算机科学与技术、信息安全、软件工程等）
- 机器人工程（荣誉项目班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（材料、化工与高分子）
- 理科试验班（生命、环境、化学与地学）
- 工科试验班（智能制造与机器人创新班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 应用生物科学（农学，含竺可桢学院新农科实验班）
- 农业工程（含卓越班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（311–411名）内，建议以二档工科试验班为主力、一档王牌专业（图灵班/人工智能）冲刺、三档农学类专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<311名）可重点冲 击一档顶尖专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science was approximately 104 → 466 → 337. In 2023, the ranking was extremely high (104th), then dropped significantly to 466th in 2024, and rebounded to 337th in 2025, showing considerable fluctuation in recent two years; the baseline for 2025 is about 337th.\ nThe provincial Science enrollment plan was 20 in 2023, 22 in 2024, and 23 in 2025, with a slight annual expansion; the 2026 plan is 24, an increase of 1 compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 4.3%, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
985, 211, Double First-Class; consistently ranked 3rd in the Soft Science Main Ranking for many years (3rd from 2021 to 2026), a top national university with strong appeal to candidates; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, involving academic misconduct, teacher ethics, and campus safety incidents, which may slightly affect some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranking 14th (high heat), with high short video exposure and still high attention; few historical abnormal filing records; has 39 A- or above disciplines, including Computer Science and Technology A+, Software Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Optical Engineering A+, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A+, etc., with extremely strong disciplinary strength, highly matching the Science enrollment majors.
6. [Major Popularity and Environment] Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other majors continue to be highly recommended, consistent with Zhejiang University's Engineering Experimental Class (Information), Computer and other top major directions, increasing competition heat; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 238,000 (uncertain mark), a significant increase from 2025 (Science 52,538 + Liberal Arts 24,010 = 76,548), estimated by historical proportion to be about 163,000 for Science, significantly intensifying competition.
7. [Regional Factors] Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang, an economically developed eastern coastal region, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Xinjiang candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 337th, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (4.3%), the significant increase in provincial candidates, and the slightly negative reputation, the expansion relief effect is offset by the surge in candidates, resulting in slightly intensified overall competition; the predicted minimum ranking is about 361st, with a range of 311–411.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Turing Class) (Computer Science and Technology)
- Artificial Intelligence
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information) (Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Software Engineering, etc.)
- Robotics Engineering (Honors Program Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Materials, Chemical Engineering and Polymer)
- Science Experimental Class (Life, Environment, Chemistry and Geoscience)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and Robotics Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Applied Biological Science (Agriculture, including Chu Kochen Honors College New Agricultural Science Experimental Class)
- Agricultural Engineering (including Excellence Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (311–411), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 top majors (Turing Class/Artificial Intelligence) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 agricultural majors as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<311), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 top majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 98 → 92 → 120, fluctuating around the top 100, with a slight rise to 92 in 2024 and a drop to 120 in 2025; the baseline for 2025 is about 120; the provincial liberal arts enrollment plan was 13 in 2023, 12 in 2024, and 11 in 2025, showing a gradual contraction trend; the 2026 plan is 12, an increase of 1 compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 9.1%, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 3rd in the main Soft Science ranking for many consecutive years, a top national comprehensive university with strong liberal arts strength (Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A+, Law A, Journalism and Communication A-, etc.); the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct and campus safety incidents, which may slightly affect application willingness; Douyin popularity ranking 14th (high heat), still high attention; Foreign Languages and Literature A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Law A, Journalism and Communication A-, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, etc., highly matching liberal arts enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major is socially recommended but with divided opinions, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 238,000, a significant increase from 2025, with an estimated 75,000 liberal arts candidates based on historical proportions, leading to significantly intensified competition; Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou, which has strong cross-provincial appeal for Xinjiang liberal arts candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 120 in 2025, the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (9.1%), the significant increase in provincial candidates, and the somewhat negative reputation, the easing effect of expansion is offset by the surge in candidates, resulting in a slight overall intensification of competition; the predicted minimum ranking is about 135, with a range of 85–185.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class)
- Law.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Economics and Management, including dual degree programs)
- Humanities Experimental Class (Chinese Language and Communication).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Humanities Experimental Class (History, Philosophy, and Digital Cultural Heritage)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Public Administration).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (85–185), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Economics and Management/Humanities Experimental Class as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 Chu Kochen Honors College Experimental Class/Law as a stretch, and use Tier 3 Public Administration/Literature, History, and Philosophy majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<85), you can focus on impacting Tier 1 flagship majors.
